ksa_text: Knowledge of NoSQL database categories and their use cases, including document stores, key-value stores, wide-column stores, graph databases, and vector databases, with understanding of when each is preferred over relational alternatives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Technology Fundamentals (domain affinity 0.82); no DE-specific signals and low domain affinity. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3826). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
